meta.title: Renewal Rush
meta.tone: Fast, witty, enterprise-playful — not cringe, not heavy
meta.oneLiner: Deploy Quivly agents to save at-risk accounts before renewal day hits — 90 seconds, high score, bragging rights.
meta.scope: Small — one arena level, reskin starter template, marketing embeddable

landingPage.headline: Your new post-sales team, without the headcount.
landingPage.subheadline: AI agents that surface and act on churn risks and expansion signals to grow your accounts on autopilot.
landingPage.tagline: The AI workforce for post-sales teams

enterpriseGames.name: PagerTron (incident.io)
enterpriseGames.why: Tiny vibe-coded game on a marketing page — proves craft, fun, shareable

enterpriseGames.name: Product-themed arcade (SaaS gamification)
enterpriseGames.why: Teach the product metaphor through play, not a demo deck

whatWeAreNot: Full game / multiple levels / story campaign

premise.hook: Renewal day is in 90 seconds. Accounts are slipping. You're the post-sales lead — but you've got Quivly AI agents in your pocket.
premise.protagonist: Player = Post-Sales hero (CSM / RevOps vibe). Not a soldier — a deal-saver with AI backup.
premise.setting: Abstract 'Customer Command' arena — floating account cards, clean Quivly-branded void (think Stripe meets arcade).
premise.conflict: At-risk accounts spawn faster than you can handle alone.
premise.stakes: Save ARR before the renewal timer hits zero.
premise.whyItMatters: Mirrors real Quivly value: AI workforce scales post-sales without the chaos.

pillars: Instantly gets what Quivly does (AI helps post-sales move faster)
Shareable score screen for LinkedIn / team Slack
Built on existing FPS arena — we learn Unreal without scope creep

steps: Account orbs spawn: 🟢 Healthy (ignore), 🔴 At-risk (tag with Quivly Agent), 🟡 Expansion (bonus collect)
Deploy agent = shoot / interact — satisfying ping + '+$ARR' floater
End screen: ARR saved, accounts rescued, rank title ('Chief Renewal Officer')

acts.title: The only act
acts.description: One arena, one loop, replay for high score. Marketing CTA after play.

characters.name: You
characters.role: Post-sales lead with Quivly agents on standby

characters.name: Quivly Agent
characters.role: The 'shot' — visual beam or drone that tags at-risk accounts

uiCopy.start: Renewal day in 90 seconds. Deploy your agents.
uiCopy.startAlt: Every signal. One place. 90 seconds to act.
uiCopy.winAlt: ARR secured — your post-sales team, without the headcount.
uiCopy.loseAlt: Risk got there first. Quivly would've had the draft ready.
uiCopy.cta: See how Quivly does this for real → quivly.ai

marketingUse.team: Internal leaderboard, Friday fun, onboarding icebreaker
marketingUse.customers: Booth demo, webinar opener, 'feel the speed' moment

unrealBuildPlan: Replace targets with account orb actors
Optional: embed link or WebGL export later
openQuestions: Leaderboard: local only first, or web later?
lockedDecisions: Priority: most smooth + beautiful — premium SaaS look, not military shooter
Interaction: Agent Pulse (elegant beam) — not rifle / gun fantasy
Brand synced from quivly.ai landing page — forest logo, indigo accent #6366F1

visualDirection.aesthetic: Premium dark SaaS command center — Stripe meets arcade glow
visualDirection.mood: Calm confidence, fast but never chaotic

gameplayMapping.connect: Round start — signals flood in (orb spawn wave)
gameplayMapping.see: Player scans arena — Customer 360 orbs show ARR + status
gameplayMapping.score: Health-colored orbs: green healthy, amber medium, red at-risk
gameplayMapping.act: Agent Pulse tags at-risk accounts — Actions Feed style +ARR floater

world.floor: Dark reflective plane, subtle grid, soft indigo rim light
world.sky: Deep navy void with slow-moving light fog — no harsh skybox
world.spawn: Floating glass account orbs with soft bloom — not enemy soldiers
world.lighting: Lumen on, 1 warm key + 1 cool Quivly-blue fill, no flat lighting

feel.movement: Smooth first-person walk — no head-bob, gentle acceleration
feel.feedback: Pulse beam with particle trail, soft chime + floating +ARR text
feel.camera: Subtle post-process: bloom, vignette, color grade indigo shadows
feel.ui: Minimal HUD — thin font, glass panels, big timer, no clutter

avoid: Gun models, muzzle flash, blood, industrial grey blocks
Loud arcade chaos, cheap particle spam

unrealPolishChecklist: Enable Lumen + Virtual Shadow Maps in project settings
Add Post Process Volume: bloom, exposure, slight vignette
Replace rifle with invisible Agent Pulse (line trace + Niagara beam)
Account orbs: emissive materials + point lights
UMG HUD: Quivly colors, Inter-style typography feel
Target 60fps — small arena, few actors = smooth on Mac
